# Figure queue — candidates for the figure-sourcing loop

*Generated by `scripts/build_figure_queue.py` — do not hand-edit rows except the
status column. Regenerate after each merged figure wave. Queue shows top 40
of 328 open candidates; 8 entries already carry a figure.*

Statuses: `todo` · `in-progress:<branch>` · `done` · `no-chart` (paper has no
load-bearing figure — stamp it so the loop never re-fetches) · `blocked:<why>`.

## Stamped — out of the queue, never re-fetched

One line per entry: `- \`slug\` — no-chart · reason` or `blocked:<why>`.
Stamps survive regeneration; delete a line to re-queue an entry.

- `albouy-ehrlich-shin-metro-land` — blocked:needs-mirror · REStat paywalled; NBER WP number unresolved (w21334 is a different paper); try davidalbouy.com next shift
- `arnott-stiglitz-henry-george-theorem` — no-chart · theory paper; Figs II-III are abstract diagrams, not the theorem
- `doucet-does-georgism-work` — no-chart · web compilation; its charts are reproductions — embed at original source entries
- `dye-england-assessing-lvt` — blocked:pdf-behind-form · Lincoln download gated; route to Hermes
- `gaffney-hidden-taxable-capacity` — no-chart · 134-pp text + numerical tables only
- `hsieh-moretti-spatial-misallocation` — no-chart · headline (aggregate output loss) lives in tables/counterfactuals; figures are context distributions
- `mazzucato-mapping-rents` — no-chart · framework paper; Fig 1 duplicates JST lending data already shown on great-mortgaging
- `oates-schwab-pittsburgh` — no-chart · evidence is in tables (building permits); no figures in the paper
- `stiglitz-land-credit-inequality` — no-chart · NBER w21192 is theory (steady-state loci diagrams only)

## Re-embed placement candidates (figure already hosted; §3c re-embed rule)

Evidence pages wired to a figure-bearing source entry that do not yet show a
figure themselves. Re-embed only where the chart directly evidences the page's
headline claim; same caption + credit, link back to the source entry.
